name: Oana 2pk Acacia Wood Club Chairs - Gray/White - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Dazzle your outdoor area with a club chair that is made for both exceptional comfort and impressive style. Combining mid-century modern design with fresh colors, our club chair will be a flawless addition to any backyard or patio. This can be used as a standalone or can be used to accent your existing furniture, making this a dream for those who love to personalize their space. With solid acacia wood frames and plush outdoor cushions, this chair offers hours of fantastic conversation for you and your guests for years to come.

MID-CENTURY MODERN: Our club chair offers a mid-century modern look to your patio space with its clean lines and understated look. Featuring a traditional slatted design and wooden frames, this chair upgrades this classic style with its smooth texture and fresh cushion colors.

ACACIA WOOD: Made with acacia wood that brings a sleek and exotic look to your space, this durable hardwood naturally withstands outdoor elements and will not darken over time. Acacia wood is perfect as a solid, heavy frame that resists wear and tear.

WATER-RESISTANT CUSHIONS: Our cushions are covered with a non-porous material that makes cleaning any spill a breeze so you can spend all summer lounging outdoors in comfort.

EASY TO MAINTAIN: This chair is naturally weather resistant to most elements and its lifespan can be extended by covering or storing your cushions when not in use. Apply teak oil as needed to maintain appearance.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this chair. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included. This comes as a set of two.
